notes:
• OCR now changes the document itself: scanned PDFs get a real, invisible text layer — selectable, copyable and searchable in the preview and any PDF viewer, in every language you picked (incl. Russian, Turkish, Turkmen).
• Born-digital PDFs and locked exhibits are never touched; originals referenced in place stay untouched — LitArbi adopts a searchable copy instead.
• The completion message reports how many scans received a text layer.
